name: Chocolate Cherry Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons Fast Rise Yeast (=or= 3 tablespoons Active Dry Yeast)
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure you use REAL chocolate chips.
2. Dried cherries are typically available in health and specialty stores.
3. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified in Atari Bread 668 (posted on Genie C03 T17 M086 by GORDON on 11/15/91).
4. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
